queries: read-only evidence scoring over picks created in the last 30 days
system_runs freshness checks for worker and scheduler
provider_offers latest closing snapshot freshness check

summary.root_cause: The 847 verification blocker was not the evidence scorer implementation. The lane worktree had incomplete workspace dependency resolution and no local.env linkage, which caused missing-module failures during type-check and verify before the new report code could be evaluated fairly.
summary.resolution: The lane now has a clean local pnpm workspace install, worktree-local package links resolve correctly, local.env is present for verification, pnpm type-check passes, pnpm test:db passes, and pnpm verify passes in the 847 worktree. The evidence scorer remains read-only and generates the required proof/report artifacts.

environmental_failures: missing worktree-local package links for workspace dependencies
missing local.env file in the worktree during env:check

out_of_scope: The generated truthworthiness report currently returns system_verdict=FAIL because live scheduler freshness, provider freshness, CLV coverage, and model attribution coverage are not yet healthy. Those are future issues, not 847 implementation blockers.
Model attribution implementation, CLV redesign, and scheduler runtime fixes remain intentionally out of scope for this lane.
